title: NHRA Div4 Quarter-Max Battle for the Buckle, Race #8: XRP
series: Quarter-Max Battle for the Buckle: Grassroots Bracket Series
description:
Traveling points series where NHRA racers can earn points by claiming their best four events in Super Pro, Pro ET, Sportsman, and Junior Categories.

Super Pro & Pro ET: $5,000 in cash and prizes will be awarded and split amongst the top eight points finishers. The Champion will receive a Championship Buckle and a Pro 1 Jacket.

Sportsman & Juniors: $2,500 in cash and prizes will be awarded and split amongst the top eight points finishers. The Champion will receive a Championship Buckle and a Pro 1 Jacket.

title: Get M 125 Twin 10's - Cotton Co. Promotions
description: FULL SCHEDULE — THURSDAY: Parking 4:00PM–10:00PM. FRIDAY: Gates Open 8:00AM, Registration 10:00AM, Test & Tune ($40) 1:00PM, R1 Gamblers 4:00PM. SATURDAY: Gates Open 8:00AM, Time Run 9:00AM, R1 Eliminations to Follow. SUNDAY: Gates Open 7:00AM, RFC Service 8:00AM, R1 Eliminations 9:00AM. | PAYOUTS — Friday Gamblers: $2,000 to win, $1,000 runner-up, $400 semi-finals, $200 quarter-finals. Double entries allowed. | Saturday & Sunday Mains (each): $10,000 to win, $2,250 runner-up, $500 semi-finals, $250 quarter-finals, $150 5th Rd win, $100 4th Rd win, $50 3rd Rd win. $100 Buyback each day. Round money does NOT compound. | 32 Car Shootout (Saturday Night): $250 entry, $5,000 to win, 1,000 runner-up. | Bottom Bulb Elite 25 (Kingston, OK – EFT sponsor): Only 25 BOGO entries sold. $1,500 bonus Sat & Sun. Bottom Bulb winner joins next round with Top Bulb earning round money. | Only 125 pre-entries sold — every entry is doubled! Registration opens March 1, 2026. All registrations at www.raceccrp.com. $200 due at pre-entry to lock in spot, $149 balance due at facility. Gate entries (if not sold out) $449. No refunds if event canceled (entries can be sold by racers). | Sponsors: McLarren Electric, Laris Motorsports Insurance / Hydration Station, Porta-Tree Timing Systems, Sunset Performance Engines, Cook Motor Co. (Wichita Falls, TX), EFT (Kingston, OK). | General rules: All races run on 1/8 mile. Ladder at 16 cars or less with best previous reaction time getting lane choice. 8.00 and faster in SP. No deep staging. RPM Limit Down Track strictly prohibited. No gold cards. No refunds. 3.5% fee on credit card charges. Checks/cash accepted.
raw_driver_fee: $349 BOGO (Buy One Get One) for Saturday & Sunday mains; $75 entry / $45 buyback for Friday Gamblers; $250 entry for 32 Car Shootout (Sat Night); $15/day or $40 weekend crew fee

description: True Street purse: $20,000. Daily Driver purse: $15,000. Small Tire purse: $10,000. Index classes (8.20, 7.50, 6.50, 5.50) with $150 Entry and 100% Buy Back. Track address: 5601 W Stamford St, Abilene, TX 79603.

title: Freedom of War - $150,000 Small Tire
description: No-prep event. $150,000 guaranteed in payouts. Small Tire payouts: 1st $75,000 / 2nd $20,000 / 3rd $10,000 / 4th $10,000 / 5th $6,250 / 6th $6,250 / 7th $6,250 / 8th $6,250. True Street payout: $5,000 off the trailer. 2nd Chance Small Tire payout: $10,000. Daily Driver payout: $3,000. Jr Dragsters payout: $1,000. 8.20 Class payout: $2,000. Scrambler payout: $3,000. Lil Scrambler payout: $3,000. Baby Scrambler payout: $2,000. Friday: Gates open 8AM, Driver's Meeting 12:15PM. Saturday: Gates open 8AM, Driver's Meeting 12PM, Fireworks 9:30PM. Firework Show Saturday night. PowerWheels Race Saturday. Address: 5601 W Stamford St, Abilene, TX 79603.
raw_driver_fee: Small Tire: $1,000 entry + $200 lock-in (64 cars, 1st round Friday); True Street: $250 entry (1st round Friday); Daily Driver: $200 entry (15 car min, Friday & Saturday); Jr Dragsters: $50 entry + 1 buy back (Friday & Saturday); 8.20 Class: $150 entry (15 car min, Friday & Saturday); Scrambler: $200 entry (15 car min, Saturday); Lil Scrambler: $200 entry (15 car min, Saturday); Baby Scrambler: $200 entry (15 car min, Saturday)

title: Rumble in the Jungle
description:
Presented by Last Minute Racing. Sponsored by Nitrous Express (NX). Grudge Racing both days. 

FRIDAY payouts: Lil Gangstas $250 buy-in / $5,000 to win; 6.50 Index $200 buy-in / $2,000 to win; 7.50 Index $200 buy-in / $2,000 to win.

SATURDAY payouts: Lil Gangstas $250 buy-in / $10,000 to win; 6.50 Index $200 buy-in / $4,000 to win; 7.50 Index $200 buy-in / $4,000 to win.

Lil Gangstas rules: 5.30 index, 28x10.5 (no WS), 275/60/15 radial or smaller (unless factory-equipped on 17in rim or bigger), door car/trucks, no wheelie bars, no throttle stops, no delay boxes, no time slips.

6.50 Index rules: First round buy backs, pro tree, transbrake allowed, no throttle stops, no delay boxes.

7.50 Index rules: First round buy backs, pro tree, footbrake only, no throttle stops.

Track address: 1800 S Interstate 45 Service Rd, Ferris, TX 75125. Strange Gangstas logo visible on flyer.
raw_driver_fee: $30 per person; $30 pit parking; $30 tech card; $50/day for RV w/o trailer. Buy-ins: Lil Gangstas $250, 6.50 Index $200, 7.50 Index $200

title: Grudge Fest 4
series: LOL Racing / Nitrous Express (NX) presented event
description:
Friday Gates Open: 5PM | Saturday Gates Open: 1PM | Saturday Track's Hot: 3PM | Tech Cards: $30/day | Pit Side Parking: $25/day | RVs and Travel Trailers not attached to a car trailer: $50/day | Free Parking on Spectator Side. 

CLASS DETAILS:
• Anything on 28s ($10,000 to win): 28/275 tire, any power adder, any chassis, class cars are welcome.
• All Steel, All Glass ($10,000 to win): No class cars, 28/275 or smaller, any power adder, steel doors required unless factory, real side glass required, no IDC CF/FB front ends allowed, Lexan front and rear OK, steel fenders required unless factory, ladder bar & 4 links OK.
• Lil Tangstas 5.30 ($10,000 to win, $300 buy-in): 28x10.5 slick (non W) or 275 radial, door cars only, no testing the day of race, no tickets or timeslips, no wheelie bars, no throttle controllers.

Track address: 1800 S Interstate 45 Service Rd, Ferris, TX 75125.
raw_driver_fee: $300 buy-in per class (16 car minimum per class)

title: Street Car Takeover - Ennis, Texas
description: Two-day event. FRIDAY MAY 1: Gates open racers 3:00 PM; Gates open spectators 5:00 PM; Open Test & Tune 6:00–11:00 PM; Q1 Street Racer / 1/4 Mile Queens / Jr's 6:00 PM; Q2 Street Racer / 1/4 Mile Queens / Jr's 9:00 PM. SATURDAY MAY 2: Gates open racers 8:00 AM; Gates open spectators 9:00 AM; Mandatory Roll Race Meeting 9:00 AM; Roll Race Qualifying 9:30 AM; Roll Race Eliminations 11:00 AM; Open Test & Tune 12:30–1:30 PM; Drag Race Drivers Meeting 1:00 PM; All Drag Race Classes Q3 2:00 PM; Round 1 – Lil Gangstas 2:15 PM; Round 1 – All Classes 4:00 PM. Tagline: "Where Street Cars Go to Party."
